validationRuns.detail: Status ready_with_concerns: Blocking Findings: None; 6 non-blocking advisories. Measured: 38/38 unique titles and meta descriptions; one self-referencing live-origin canonical per page; single h1 per page; JSON-LD 0 parse errors (Restaurant 38, WebSite 38, WebPage 37, BreadcrumbList 37, FAQPage 21, Menu 1, ContactPage 1); single consistent NAP tuple; 0 broken internal links; 138 images 0 missing alt; tel: CTA on every page; real GA4 id everywhere; zero fixture flags; count-free review claim; robots.txt AI-crawler allow-list (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended); llms.txt 8 sections well-formed; sitemap 38/38 on-origin, no funnel paths; live 200 on /, /robots.txt, /llms.txt, /sitemap-index.xml, /menu/, /contact/, /faq/; live robots.txt identical to dist.

seoGeoAudit.auditTarget: dist/ (Phase 4 build, 38 routes) cross-checked against https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app crawl surfaces

remainingAdvisories: Open Graph / Twitter Card meta tags are absent on all 38 pages (no og:title/og:description/og:url/og:type/og:image or twitter:*); social and chat-app link previews degrade. Not a factory gate; add an OG block in a future template round.

Structured openingHoursSpecification covers only Mon-Thu 11:00-22:00 and Sun 11:00-20:00 while the caveated display text also claims Fri-Sat 11am-11pm (source gap: business.json hours has no structured Fri-Sat entry). Deliberately not fixed: hours are owner-unconfirmed and the sealed constraint forbids adding hours claims; resolve when the owner confirms hours.

Five titles are 66-69 characters and may truncate in SERPs: /occasions/office-and-party-catering/ (69), /catering-cedar-rapids/ (68), /open-late-cedar-rapids/ (67), /fried-chicken-and-wings-cedar-rapids/ (66), /menu/seafood/ (66).
/menu/ meta description is 203 characters and will truncate around ~165 in SERPs; the clipped tail is non-primary (delivery-apps mention).
Hours remain owner-unconfirmed; every page and llms.txt correctly keep the 'please call to confirm' caveat until the owner confirms.

Dual visible phone display formats: tel: CTAs show +1-319-221-1040 while body copy shows (319) 221-1040; same number and schema-consistent, cosmetic only. Runtime CWV/Lighthouse is out of factory-validate scope and was not measured; route to local-launch-checklist after the Phase 7 deploy.
